title: Threats And Monsters
description: This Is A Mod Made To Make Modpacks More Fun By Adding some Lower Level Threats that aren't furries, lycanites or just not actually low level
body: This Is A Very Simple Mod It Adds Mobs That Are Aimed At Iron-Diamond Tier Because The Only Real Options Are Too Intrusive Too Strong Or Too Weak I Plan To Add Mobs Of Every Tier Slowly But My Progress Will Be Slow
